name: Bird's Nest Breakfast Cups
instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C). Grease 4 muffin cups. 2. Mix the thawed shredded hash brown potatoes, salt, black pepper, olive oil, and half of the shredded Cheddar cheese. 3. Divide mixture between muffin cups, shaping into nests with hollows in the middle. 4. Bake until browned on the edges and cheese melts, 15-18 minutes. 5. Whisk the eggs and water; season with salt and black pepper. 6. Pour egg mixture into each nest; sprinkle with crumbled bacon and the remaining shredded Cheddar cheese. 7. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake until eggs set, 13-16 minutes. 8. Let cool in pans before removing by sliding a knife around the edge.
simpleInstructions: 1. Prepare oven and muffin cups. 2. Mix the hash brown ingredients and form nests. 3. Bake nests until browned. 4. Combine the eggs and seasonings. 5. Fill nests with egg mixture and toppings. 6. Bake until eggs set. 7. Cool and remove cups.
